title: Genotyping the ADAMTS5-P Mouse Strain
author: Bianca Hemmeryckx
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.kaucsew

steps.title: Cut a very small piece of the ear
steps.instruction: Cut a very small piece of the ear

steps.title: Collect them in an labeled eppendorf...
steps.instruction: Collect them in an labeled eppendorf tube filled with 800 µl lysis buffer supplemented with 8µl 10 mg/ml proteinase K solution * Lysis buffer (1L): -40 ml 5M NaCl (0.2 M) -20 ml 10% SDS (0.02%) -100 ml 1M Tris HCl pH 8 (0.1 M) -10 ml 0.5M EDTA (5 mM) -830 ml ultra-pure (MilliQ) water *10 mg /ml Proteinase K solution: dissolve 100 mg in 5 ml MilliQ water and 5 ml 100% ethanol. 100 mg Proteinase K Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #3115879001

steps.title: Centrifuge samples for 10 min at...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge samples for 10 min at 13000 rpm at room temperature.

steps.title: Transfer the supernatants with DNA in...
steps.instruction: Transfer the supernatants with DNA in tubes filled with 600 µl isopropanol. Leave until all tubes are transferred.

steps.title: Mix one tube slowly at a...
steps.instruction: Mix one tube slowly at a time by inversion, DNA fibers will appear in the tube.

steps.title: Collect DNA fibers with pipette tips...
steps.instruction: Collect DNA fibers with pipette tips (put your finger on the end of the tip to avoid as much as possible that liquid enters in the tip)

steps.title: Transfer pipett tips in new labeled...
steps.instruction: Transfer pipett tips in new labeled tubes containing 200 µl TE buffer (allow rehydration of DNA to occur during 15 min before removing the tips) *TE buffer (1L): -10 ml 1 M Tris-HCl pH 7.5 (10 mM) -2 ml 0.5 M EDTA (1 mM) -988 ml MilliQ water -autoclave

steps.title: Incubate 1-2 hours at 55°C and...
steps.instruction: Incubate 1-2 hours at 55°C and vortex to dissolve the DNA. If genotyping is postponed, store samples at -20°C, otherwise proceed.

steps.title: Prepare samples by combining PCR beads...
steps.instruction: Prepare samples by combining PCR beads with 5µl of forward primer 5’-TTT GAA TTT GTC TTT GGA AGG CCT C-3’ (10 µM work concentration; 2 µM final concentration) and 5µl of reverse primer 5’-TAT CCC CGG ATG AGT CAA CAC TGT C-3’ (10 µM work concentration; 2 µM final concentration), 14µl MilliQ water and 1µl DNA. Include negative control (no DNA). Include DNA samples of a previous genotyped ADAMTS5-P wild-type (WT), heterozygous (HE) and homozygous (knockout, KO) animal as positive controles. Primer sequences were provided by the group of Prof. J. Sandy (Rush University Medical Center, Chicago, IL, USA). Illustra PuReTaq Ready-To-Go PCR Beads GE Healthcare Catalog #27-9557-02

steps.title: Put PCR samples in 2720 Thermal...
steps.instruction: Put PCR samples in 2720 Thermal Cycler (Applied Biosystems, Foster City, CA, USA)

steps.title: Cycling conditions are:-94°C 2 min-40 cycles...
steps.instruction: Cycling conditions are:-94°C 2 min-40 cycles of 94°C 30 sec; 63°C 30 sec; 68°C 95 sec-72°C 5 min

steps.title: Pour a 2% (= 2g/100 ml)...
steps.instruction: Pour a 2% (= 2g/100 ml) agarose gel in 1x TAE buffer and immerse gel in 0.5x TAE supplemented with Midori Green Advanced DNA Stain (5µl/100 ml buffer) * 50x TAE (1L): -242g Tris base -57.1 ml glacial acetic acid -100 ml 500 mM EDTA pH 8.0 (50 mM) -Add MilliQ water until 800 ml -Stir -Bring final volume to 1L with MilliQ water -Autoclave *1x TAE (1L): -20 ml 50x TAE -980 ml MilliQ water Contains 40 mM Tris, 20 mM glacial acetic acid and 1 mM EDTA. *0.5x TAE (1L): -10 ml 50x TAE -990 ml MilliQ water Contains 20 mM Tris, 10 mM glacial acetic acid and 0.5 mM EDTA. Molecular Biology Grade Agarose Contributed by users Catalog #EP-0010-05 Midori Green Advanced DNA stain Contributed by users Catalog #NG MG04

steps.title: Prepare samples
steps.instruction: Prepare samples: add 5µl Orange DNA loading dye to 25µl PCR mix Orange DNA loading dye Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #R0631

steps.title: Load samples (18µl) together with 18µl...
steps.instruction: Load samples (18µl) together with 18µl TriDye 100 bp DNA ladder TriDye 100 bp DNA Ladder - 125 gel lanes New England Biolabs Catalog #N3271S

steps.title: Run samples for 30 min with...
steps.instruction: Run samples for 30 min with 135V on a Mupid-One electrophoresis System Eurogentec SA

steps.title: Image gel using the Biorad Molecular...
steps.instruction: Image gel using the Biorad Molecular Imager Gel Doc XR+ Image System, take picture and digitally save the image.

steps.title: Identify ADAMTS5 WT samples as samples...
steps.instruction: Identify ADAMTS5 WT samples as samples exhibiting a single band of 650 bp, ADAMTS5 KO samples as samples showing a single band of 380 bp, while the ADAMTS5 HE samples show both bands.
